Metadata.title: GeoBiz — Business Management SaaS Platform
Metadata.description: GeoBiz — #1 business management platform in Georgia. Complete management for hotels, restaurants, beauty salons, shops, breweries, wineries, and distilleries on one platform. Start free.
Metadata.ogDescription: Complete management for hotels, restaurants, beauty salons, shops, breweries, wineries, and distilleries on one platform.

Hero.title: GeoBiz
Hero.subtitle: Multi-Module Business Management Platform
Hero.description: One platform for every business — from hotels to restaurants, beauty salons to retail shops

Modules.subtitle: Choose the module that fits your business

distillery.description: Distillery management — production processes, barrel management, sales, and analytics

Pricing.hotelFeaturesSubtitle: Boost your hotel efficiency with our latest integrations

channelManager.title: Channel Manager
channelManager.subtitle: Booking.com & Airbnb integration
channelManager.description: Connect your hotel to Booking.com and Airbnb. Reservations sync automatically — no more manual updates.

messengerBot.title: Facebook Messenger Bot
messengerBot.subtitle: 24/7 automated booking
messengerBot.description: Guests can book rooms directly from Facebook Messenger. The bot responds automatically and creates reservations in your calendar.

Pricing.shopFeaturesSubtitle: Modern POS with fiscal integration and point-of-sale hardware

fiscal.title: Fiscal integration
fiscal.subtitle: Kasa.ge & Daisy Expert
fiscal.description: Every sale is printed on a fiscal receipt automatically. Kasa.ge and Daisy Expert fiscal devices are supported.

hardware.title: Hardware compatibility
hardware.subtitle: Epson, Bixolon, Star, Honeywell, ACLAS, Rongta, Xprinter
hardware.description: Receipt printers, barcode scanners, and fiscal devices — major manufacturers are supported.

rsge.title: RS.ge integration
rsge.subtitle: Automatic reporting
rsge.description: Automatically send sales data to RS.ge for regulatory compliance.

faq.q: How does the reservation system work?
faq.a: The system lets you easily manage room reservations and check-in/check-out with a visual calendar interface.
Night Audit is the closing of daily financial operations and the generation of reports.
The Enterprise package includes multi-location management from a single panel.
Channel Manager automatically syncs your calendar with Booking.com and Airbnb. Reservations update in real time, preventing double-bookings.

faq.q: How does the Facebook Messenger Bot work?
faq.a: The bot answers your guests on Facebook Messenger 24/7. It shows prices, checks availability, and automatically creates reservations in your calendar.

restaurant.name: Restaurant Management System
restaurant.description: POS terminal, KDS kitchen, table management, reservations, food cost, analytics
starterFeatures: Menu management (categories, dishes, modifiers, combo sets)
POS terminal (Dine In, Take Away, Delivery)

faq.a: The system lets you easily manage table reservations with a calendar, overlap checks, and automatic status changes.
Kitchen Display System — orders appear in real time on screens in the kitchen, organized by stations (HOT, COLD, BAR, PIZZA, GRILL, PASTRY).
Each dish is linked to a recipe with ingredients. When an order is placed, inventory is automatically deducted and Food Cost is calculated.
At the end of the day a Z-report is generated — a complete financial report: sales, payment methods, average check, top dishes.
Yes, the POS terminal supports Dine In, Take Away, and Delivery orders with customer addresses.

beauty.name: Beauty Salon Management
beauty.description: Bookings, clients, POS, inventory, finance, loyalty, online booking, AI assistant

faq.a: The client opens your link, selects a service, specialist, date/time, and books. You confirm from the admin panel.

faq.q: How does the loyalty system work?
faq.a: Clients earn 1 point for every 10₾ spent. There are 4 tiers: Standard, Silver (100+), Gold (500+), VIP (1000+). You can also create gift cards.
A Claude-based chatbot that knows your salon's data — revenue, bookings, inventory — and gives you business recommendations.
With the POS you sell services and products with discounts and various payment methods. Inventory is deducted automatically.
Yes, the finance module shows each specialist's revenue, sales, and commission — percentage or fixed.

shop.name: Shop Management System
shop.description: Modern POS system — POS terminal, inventory management, fiscal integration, RS.ge

faq.q: How does fiscal device integration work?
faq.a: The system supports Kasa.ge and Daisy Expert fiscal devices. Every sale is automatically printed on a fiscal receipt.
USB and Bluetooth barcode scanners are supported — Epson, Bixolon, Star, Honeywell, ACLAS, Rongta, Xprinter.

faq.q: Can I import data from my old system?
faq.a: Yes. You can import products, categories, suppliers, and customers in CSV/Excel format.
RS.ge integration lets you automatically send sales data to the RS.ge system for legal compliance.

faq.q: How does online store integration work?
faq.a: The Enterprise plan includes WooCommerce and Shopify integration — inventory and turnover sync with the online store.

faq.q: What hardware works with the system?
faq.a: Receipt printers (Epson, Bixolon, Star, Xprinter), barcode scanners, and Kasa.ge / Daisy fiscal devices are supported.
The system lets you create and manage beer recipes, ingredients, and production processes.
SPLIT lets you divide one batch into multiple parts, BLEND lets you mix multiple batches together.
Clean-In-Place — an automatic tank cleaning system to ensure hygiene.
The system lets you manage barrels, their age, and location.

faq.q: How does distillation process management work?
faq.a: The system lets you manage distillation processes, recipes, and barrel ages.
